name: config init scaffolds ctp.config.yaml listing every active rule grouped by source namespace with src and enforcing-tool annotations
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/config.sh" init 2>e.txt; grep -qE 'rules_listed=[0-9]+ namespaces=[0-9]+' e.txt && [ -f ctp.config.yaml ] && grep -q 'enforced_by:' ctp.config.yaml && echo init-scaffolds-rules 1>&2
